[et_pb_section fb_built="1" theme_builder_area="post_content" module_id="msc-experience" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default"][et_pb_row column_structure="3_5,2_5" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_column type="3_5" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Our Background

Built on Experience, Not Guesswork

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

We've been creating content and working with creators for over two decades. From early content production with Every Way Woman to building platforms through Inavizion Media and My Creative Space, our work has always centered around helping creators bring their ideas to life.

Since 2000, we've designed and built websites for clients across industries, with a focus on creators, entrepreneurs, and media-based businesses. Today, My Studio Channel brings that experience together — helping creators launch their own platform with structure, clarity, and real support.

Who we've worked with

  • Creators and entrepreneurs through My Creative Space
  • Content creators, filmmakers, and brands through Inavizion Media
  • Clients from website builds, content capture, and coaching programs
  • Ongoing work with creators launching platforms through My Studio Channel
[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="2_5" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_image src="/media/creator-in-mind.jpg" alt="creator in mind" title_text="creator-in-mind.jpg" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content" show_in_lightbox="off" url_new_window="off" align="center" force_fullwidth="off" always_center_on_mobile="on"][/et_pb_image][et_pb_spacer _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" height="24px"][/et_pb_spacer][et_pb_image src="/media/camera-crew.jpg" alt="camera crew" title_text="camera-crew.jpg" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content" show_in_lightbox="off" url_new_window="off" align="center" force_fullwidth="off" always_center_on_mobile="on"][/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
